result.stderr:
dbmtool 1.0.4
Copyright © Amel Musić

  -r, --read              Required. Input files or directories to be copied

  -d, --destination       Required. (Default: ) Destination

  --verbose               (Default: false) Prints all messages to standard
                          output.

  -o, --override          (Default: false) Override files/directory at
                          destination

  -g, --guessnamespace    (Default: true) Guess namespace at destination based
                          on folder name

  -n, --namespace         (Default: ) Namespace at destination

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
